projects.name: CrystalZone
projects.shortDescription: Online gaming marketplace for buying digital games, in-game items, and gaming accessories securely.
projects.fullDescription: CrystalZone is a modern online gaming marketplace where users can purchase digital games, in-game currencies, skins, gift cards, and gaming accessories. The platform focuses on secure payments, instant digital delivery, and a seamless shopping experience. Built with performance and scalability in mind, CrystalZone provides gamers with a fast, reliable, and secure way to buy their favorite gaming products.
projects.challenge: The main challenge was building a secure digital product delivery system while ensuring payment verification and fraud prevention. The platform also needed to handle high traffic during game sales and launches.
projects.solution: We implemented Stripe for secure payment processing and built a real-time order verification system using Firebase. The infrastructure was optimized for performance and scalability to handle peak gaming traffic.

projects.name: RestoAI
projects.shortDescription: Multi-role smart AI restaurant management and automation system.
projects.fullDescription: RestoAI is an intelligent restaurant management system designed to automate operations and improve efficiency. It supports multiple roles including admin, manager, chef, waiter, and cashier. The platform integrates AI-powered features like demand forecasting, automated inventory tracking, smart order management, and customer behavior analytics to streamline restaurant workflows.
projects.challenge: Restaurants struggle with managing staff roles, inventory tracking, and predicting peak hours. Manual processes caused inefficiencies and revenue loss.
projects.solution: We developed a centralized system with AI forecasting and automated inventory alerts. Real-time order tracking and role-based dashboards improved communication between staff members.

projects.name: FlowDesk
projects.shortDescription: Smart AI productivity tool for task management, focus tracking, and workflow automation.
projects.fullDescription: FlowDesk is an AI-powered productivity platform designed to help individuals and teams stay organized and focused. It combines smart task prioritization, automated workflow generation, focus tracking, and AI-powered recommendations to maximize productivity. FlowDesk adapts to user behavior.
projects.challenge: Many productivity tools lack intelligent automation and personalized task prioritization, leading to overwhelm and inefficiency.
projects.solution: We integrated AI to analyze user habits and dynamically prioritize tasks. FlowDesk automatically generates optimized daily plans and suggests workflow improvements.
results: Reduced procrastination through AI focus mode
Adopted by remote teams and freelancers
Positive user retention within first 3 months

projects.name: Behance
projects.shortDescription: Freelance marketplace platform for designers across logo, web, graphic, UI/UX, and architecture fields.
projects.fullDescription: Behance is a freelance career and job marketplace platform where designers can showcase portfolios and get hired. It supports logo design, website design, UI/UX, branding, graphic design, architecture, interior design, and more. Clients can post jobs, hire freelancers, manage contracts, and securely process payments.
features: Category-based hiring (Logo, Web, UI/UX, Architecture, Branding)
projects.challenge: Building a scalable freelance marketplace with secure payments, portfolio management, and real-time communication.
projects.solution: Implemented an escrow-based Stripe payment flow, real-time chat system, and scalable portfolio hosting with optimized performance.
results: High engagement in first launch phase

projects.name: HeavenlyWeds
projects.shortDescription: Simple personal wedding website for sharing event details, couple story, and photo gallery.
projects.fullDescription: HeavenlyWeds is a clean and elegant personal wedding website created for a client to share their wedding details with friends and family. The website includes the couple’s story, event schedule, venue details, and a small photo gallery. It was designed to be simple, fast, and mobile-friendly so guests can easily view all wedding information in one place.
projects.challenge: The goal was to design a beautiful wedding website while keeping it simple and easy for guests to navigate.
projects.solution: A minimal and responsive design was built using Next.js and Tailwind CSS to ensure fast loading and a smooth user experience.
results: Easy access to wedding details for guests
